report.summary: UX audit of 2 tool pages and 20+ learn pages, created 5 missing OG images, implemented accessibility and interaction refinements across TokenSecurityScanner and StablecoinYieldTracker.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: TokenSecurityScanner: Added focus-visible outline (2px solid #6366f1) on address input for keyboard navigation accessibility
TokenSecurityScanner: Added role='listbox' and aria-label to chain dropdown for screen reader support
TokenSecurityScanner: Added Escape key handler on dropdown options to close the dropdown
TokenSecurityScanner: Added focus-visible styles with box-shadow on chain option buttons
TokenSecurityScanner: Added min-height: 48px to scan button for mobile touch target compliance
StablecoinYieldTracker: Fixed breadcrumb to include 'Home' link (was missing, only showed Tools > Tracker)
StablecoinYieldTracker: Added prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable animations for users who prefer reduced motion
StablecoinYieldTracker: Added transition properties to filter chip buttons for smoother state changes
StablecoinYieldTracker: Added data source attribution badges ('Data via DeFiLlama & protocol APIs') and freshness indicator ('Updated March 2026') for trust through transparency

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-leverage-trading-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Trading badge, leverage multiplier risk visualization
OG image: rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Yield badge, RWA vs DeFi comparison bars
OG image: citrea-bitcoin-zk-rollup-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Layer 2 badge, Bitcoin→ZK Proof→Citrea architecture diagram
OG image: tokenized-treasury-bills-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — RWA badge, yield comparison table (USDY/USDM/USD0++)
OG image: crypto-bear-market-investing-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Strategy badge, 4-phase bear market timeline

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: tools/token-security-scanner — Full UX audit: input validation, dropdown a11y, mobile layout, loading states
tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker — Full UX audit: breadcrumb, filters, card grid, empty state, risk guide, disclaimer
20+ learn pages (batch-created last 24h) — Spot-checked structure: TOC, breadcrumbs, structured data, OG images

sections.title: Audit Findings (No Fix Needed)
items: TokenSecurityScanner already had good mobile responsive breakpoints (640px), loading spinner, and prefers-reduced-motion
StablecoinYieldTracker filter chips already met 44px min-height touch target requirement
Both tool pages had proper empty states with helpful CTAs
Learn pages follow consistent template: header badges, TOC nav, structured data, breadcrumbs
